name: Seerr Proxy
description: Authenticated Jellyfin transport for Seerr. Linked Jellyfin users can discover the plugin, call allowlisted Seerr API endpoints through Jellyfin, and submit requests as themselves without receiving Seerr credentials.
overview: Proxy Seerr API calls through Jellyfin authentication

versions.changelog:

- chore: trigger release (3618596)
- docs(plugin): clarify seerr proxy description (#5) (e021aaa)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/jellyfin-seerr-proxy/compare/1.0.0.5...1.0.0.6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/jellyfin-seerr-proxy/compare/1.0.0.2...1.0.0.3

## What's Changed

- Fix authenticated Jellyfin user lookup (3051ff7)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/jellyfin-seerr-proxy/compare/1.0.0.1...1.0.0.2

## What's Changed

- feat: add seerr proxy plugin (3004ba2)
- chore: initialize repository (0f168a5)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/jellyfin-seerr-proxy/compare/1.0.0.0...1.0.0.1

Initial release
- Authenticated Jellyfin endpoints for status, linked user lookup, and media requests
- Server-side Seerr API key storage
- Jellyfin user to Seerr user resolution through /api/v1/user/jellyfin/{jellyfinUserId}
- Seerr requests submitted with server-derived X-API-User
- Dashboard configuration page
